mapper.sql: id, table_code, table_name, dept_field, warehouse_field, user_field, company_field, enable_dept, enable_warehouse, enable_self, enable_company, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_data_permission_field WHERE table_code = #{tableCode} AND status = 0
SELECT FROM sys_data_permission_field ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_data_permission_field WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_data_permission_field ( table_code, table_name, dept_field, warehouse_field, user_field, company_field, enable_dept, enable_warehouse, enable_self, enable_company, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{tableCode}, #{tableName}, #{deptField}, #{warehouseField}, #{userField}, #{companyField}, #{enableDept}, #{enableWarehouse}, #{enableSelf}, #{enableCompany}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_data_permission_field SET table_name = #{tableName}, dept_field = #{deptField}, warehouse_field = #{warehouseField}, user_field = #{userField}, company_field = #{companyField}, enable_dept = #{enableDept}, enable_warehouse = #{enableWarehouse}, enable_self = #{enableSelf}, enable_company = #{enableCompany}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_data_permission_field WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_data_permission_field WHERE table_code = #{tableCode}
